# Spaceship tileset

- Creator: cptfoorman
- Source: https://cptfoorman.itch.io/spaceship-tileset
- Original archive: `spaceship stuff.rar`
- Permission: the creator's download page says the tileset may be used in games.
- AI disclosure: itch.io marks the pack as “No generative AI was used.”

The PNG files in this directory are exact copies from the downloaded archive. Their filenames were normalized for project consistency; their pixel content was not modified.
